name: Henry A. Wallace
description: American politician (1888–1965); Vice President of the United States from 1941 to 1945
abstract: Henry Agard Wallace (October 7, 1888 – November 18, 1965) was the 33rd vice president of the United States, serving from 1941 to 1945, under President Franklin D. Roosevelt.

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: In your opinion, why did that happen? ... coming from Roosevelt’s administration and Henry Wallace and all that kind of stuff
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: I got involved with the Progressive Party, rang doorbells for Henry Wallace, and went to a couple of meetings
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
